project.objective: When and where was Robert Raymond McKee born?

questions.question: When and where was Robert Raymond McKee (died 18 Aug 1958, Chicago, Illinois; son of Robert McKee and Margaret Pollock of Newry, County Down, Ireland) born?
questions.rationale: The subject L8K8-W12 has no birth fact recorded in the tree. His parents were married in Newry, County Down in 1890 and the family resided in Newry in 1911. Irish civil birth registration (GRO) and the 1901/1911 Ireland census are the primary record sets most likely to document his birth date and place. This is the direct decomposition of the project objective.

items.rationale: The tree places Robert Raymond McKee in Newry, County Down in 1911. The 1911 Ireland Census (FS collection 2854327) is fully indexed with images. It records each household member's exact age and birthplace, yielding both a calculated birth year and likely county of birth — the highest-probability, free record for establishing approximate birth date and place.

Civil registration of births in Ireland began 1 January 1864. FamilySearch collection 2659409 'Ireland, Civil Registration, 1845-1913' contains index and images for births registered in the Newry superintendent registrar's district. A birth certificate is a primary source for date and exact place of birth. Robert's parents married in Newry in 1890, so his birth is expected ca. 1891-1912 in that district.

IrishGenealogy.ie (civilrecords.irishgenealogy.ie) provides free online access to digitized images of all Irish civil birth certificates from 1864 to 100 years ago. This is the most direct path to original certificate images for County Down births in the Newry district and serves as a fallback for the FamilySearch civil registration index.

items.jurisdiction: Stockton, San Joaquin, California, United States
items.rationale: FamilySearch source 954D-B6X (already in tree) is the 1940 US Census entry for Robert McKee in Stockton. The 1940 census records each person's birthplace (country/state) and age, from which birth year is calculated. This already-identified source needs extraction to yield birth-specific assertions that can be corroborated against Irish primary records.

items.jurisdiction: Stockton, San Joaquin, California, United States
items.rationale: The tree records Robert's WWII draft registration on 15 Feb 1942 in Stockton. WWII draft cards (Old Man's Registration) uniformly include exact birth date and birthplace — making this one of the most precise secondary sources for birth information. A search of FamilySearch's WWII draft collection will locate the card and yield the birth date and place as stated by the registrant himself.

If Robert was born before 1901 (consistent with parents' 1890 marriage), the 1901 Ireland Census (FS collection 1626180) will show him in the McKee household in Newry. The census records exact age and county of birth for each member, providing a second census-derived birth year to check against 1911 data.

FamilySearch collection 2820100 contains indexed Irish Catholic parish registers. Newry had significant Catholic congregations, and a baptism entry would provide an independent date/place of birth corroborating or refining civil registration findings. If civil registration yields no result, a baptism record may be the only surviving primary birth evidence.

FamilySearch source 954D-PNK (already in tree) is the Cook County death record for Robert McKee, d. 18 Aug 1958. Illinois death certificates of this era include fields for birthplace and father's birthplace. The informant — a family member — may have supplied birth date and birthplace, providing a secondary source to compare against Irish primary records.

query.strategy: searched for household head Robert McKee Sr. born c.1862 to surface household record including Robert Raymond McKee

log.notes: Found Household of Robert McKee in Newry, Banbridge, County Down (recordArk: ark:/61903/1:2:QYYX-RHZM). Household includes Robert Raymond McKee (ark:/61903/1:1:QYXF-J52M), son, born 1904, Co Down. same_person score 0.89 (confidence 4) vs tree subject L8K8-W12. Source already attached to L8K8-W12 with Birth/Name/Gender tags. Birth year 1904, place County Down confirmed from census index. Record-extraction needed to create formal birth assertions.

query.strategy: narrow search against collection 2659409 (images); nil — collection 2659409 is image-only, not indexed

log.notes: Zero results from collection 2659409 (Ireland, Civil Registration, 1845-1913 images). Collection appears to be image-only and not fully indexed. Broadened to collection 1408347 (Civil Registration Indexes) which yielded positive result.

query.strategy: targeted search with middle name 'Robert Raymond' in indexed civil registration collection 1408347

log.notes: Top result: 'Robert Raymond M'kee', birth registration Jan-Mar 1904, Banbridge, County Down. treeMatches: L8K8-W12 (4 stars). Distinctive middle name 'Raymond' and Q1 1904/County Down registration strongly supports identification. Collection 2659409 (images-only) returned nil; collection 1408347 (indexed) found the record. Note: index entry only — no exact day, no father/mother on index. Banbridge was the registration district for this area of County Down.

Top result ark:/61903/1:1:QVRN-ST2P is Robert R McKee, died 18 Aug 1958 Chicago, 5-star tree match to L8K8-W12, parents Robert McKee + Margaret Pollock confirmed. Birth date 29 Feb 1904 consistent with Q1 1904 civil reg. CONFLICT: birthplace recorded as New York City, New York — contradicts Ireland civil registration and 1911 census (County Down).
Collection 2100100 returned 0 results. Collection ID appears incorrect for the 1940 US Federal Census. Retrying without collection filter and adding spouse given name Elizabeth.

sources.notes: GRO quarterly abstract index derived from original civil registration registers. Index gives registrant name, registration quarter, and district — not exact birth date, parish, or parents' names. Original register image not examined; browse-only images in collection 2659409. FamilySearch tree match (4 stars) to L8K8-W12 confirmed on search result.

sources.notes: Cook County death index entry derived from original death certificate. Informant named on record as Sister M Francesca (Catholic hospital attendant or chaplain), likely present at death but not at subject's birth 54 years earlier. BIRTHPLACE CONFLICT: record states New York City, New York — contradicts Ireland civil registration (Banbridge, County Down, Q1 1904) and 1911 Ireland census (County Down). Birth date 29 Feb 1904 (Feb 29 = valid in leap year 1904) is consistent with civil reg Q1 1904. FamilySearch tree match 5 stars to L8K8-W12; parents Robert McKee and Margaret Pollock confirmed.

assertions.informant: unknown household member (likely a parent; subject was age 7)

assertions.value: born 1904 (FamilySearch indexes birth year as 1904, calculated from census age; Ireland census records age not birth year)
assertions.informant: unknown household member (likely a parent; subject age 7 could not self-report)
assertions.informant_bias_notes: Ireland 1911 census did not record the respondent. Subject was age 7 and could not self-report; only a parent could have known the birth year. However, the specific informant is unknown. Birth year 1904 is calculated by FamilySearch from census age column, not a directly stated birth year. ~7-year recall interval between birth event and census.

Ireland 1911 census did not record the respondent. A parent of this 7-year-old would have participated in the birth and known the birthplace (Co Down), which could constitute primary knowledge. However, the specific informant is unrecorded, so primary cannot be confirmed; indeterminate is the conservative classification.

Irish Civil Registration required birth registration within 42 days; the registrant's parent appeared at the GRO registrar's office and reported the name directly. Parent was present at the birth and had first-hand knowledge.

Irish Civil Registration required birth registration within 42 days of birth; parent reported the birth date to the civil registrar. The GRO index records the quarter of registration (Jan–Mar 1904) rather than the exact birth date. Birth likely occurred in the same quarter as registration.

assertions.value: Banbridge registration district, County Down, Ireland
assertions.standard_place: Banbridge, County Down, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom
assertions.informant_bias_notes: The Banbridge registration district covers the Newry area of County Down. The registrant's parent reported the birth location to the civil registrar. Consistent with the family's known residence at Newry, County Down (1911 census).
Sister M Francesca was present at death and knew the decedent by name. Primary for identifying facts known to an attendant at the scene.
Sister M Francesca was present at the time and place of death.

Sister M Francesca reported biographical facts about the deceased. She was not present at subject's birth in 1904, 54 years before death. She may have obtained birth details from hospital admission records, from the subject, or from other persons. The date 29 Feb 1904 is consistent with Q1 1904 from the Irish civil registration index.

assertions.standard_place: New York City, New York, United States
assertions.informant_bias_notes: Sister M Francesca was not present at subject's 1904 birth. The New York City birthplace directly contradicts: (1) Ireland Civil Registration index showing registration in Banbridge, County Down, Q1 1904; (2) 1911 Ireland census placing subject with his Irish-born parents in County Down. The NYC claim may reflect informant's limited biographical knowledge, confusion with the immigration port of entry, or the family's trajectory through New York on arrival in the United States. CONFLICT with a_003 and a_020.
Sister M Francesca reported parents' names. The father's name Robert McKee is consistent with all other evidence.
Sister M Francesca reported the mother's name. Margaret Pollock is consistent with all other evidence.

person_evidence.rationale: Record persona p_107515831200 (child_3) is named 'Robert Raymond McKee' — an exact match to tree person L8K8-W12 'Robert Raymond Mc Kee' (trivial Mc/Mc spacing variant). Residence 1911 Newry, Banbridge, County Down identical to L8K8-W12's 1911 residence fact. Household parents match L8K8-W12's tree parents LT1G-QP2 (Robert McKee) and LJK3-9QP (Margaret Pollock). Source already attached to L8K8-W12 in FamilySearch (treeMatches: LT1G-QP2 5 stars for head, record flags QYXF-J52M as the child). same_person score degenerate (0.037) due to local-tree ARK not resolvable by FS API; qualitative correlation is strong.

Birth year ~1904 derived from census age. Attached to Robert Raymond McKee (p_107515831200, child_3) whose identity as L8K8-W12 is established by name, residence, and parentage. No conflicting birth year exists in the tree. Consistent with migration record (1923 immigration) and death record (died 1958). Strong match on all identifiers.

Birth place 'Co Down' for Robert Raymond McKee (p_107515831200, child_3). Consistent with L8K8-W12's known residence in Newry, County Down in 1911. No conflicting birthplace exists in the tree for L8K8-W12. Identity established by name, residence, and parentage.
Residence 1911, Newry, Banbridge, County Down for child_3. Matches L8K8-W12's existing residence fact in tree. Identity established by name, birth facts, and parentage match.

Relationship assertion: child_3 is son of head Robert McKee (p_107486297200) and wife Margaret McKee (p_107486297300). L8K8-W12 has ParentChild edges to LT1G-QP2 and LJK3-9QP in the tree, who match the record's head and wife respectively. This assertion bears on L8K8-W12 as the child party in the relationship.

Relationship assertion names Robert McKee (head_of_household, p_107486297200) as father of child_3. LT1G-QP2 is 'Robert McKee', born 1862 Armagh, head of 1911 Newry household per tree. Record head p_107486297200 born 1863 Co Armagh, name exact, treeMatches: LT1G-QP2 (5 stars). This assertion bears on LT1G-QP2 as the parent party.

Relationship assertion names Margaret McKee (wife, p_107486297300) as mother of child_3. LJK3-9QP is 'Margaret Pollock' (née Pollock, married McKee), born 1864 Co Down; wife of LT1G-QP2 per tree rel-2 (married 1890 Newry). Record wife p_107486297300 born 1865 Co Down, name 'Margaret McKee' matches married name. This assertion bears on LJK3-9QP as the parent party.
Religion 'Unitarian' for child_3 Robert Raymond McKee. Attached to L8K8-W12 via strong name/residence/parentage match established across a_001–a_005.
Occupation 'Scholar' (attending school) for child_3 Robert Raymond McKee, age ~7 in 1911. Attached to L8K8-W12 via strong name/residence/parentage match.

Record persona p_107486297200 (head_of_household) is named 'Robert McKee'. Tree person LT1G-QP2 is 'Robert McKee'. Born 1863 Co Armagh (record) vs 1862 Armagh (tree, ±1yr). Resided Newry, County Down 1911 in both record and tree. FamilySearch explicitly matches this persona to LT1G-QP2 (treeMatches: 5 stars). matchRelatives preScore 0.96 for father pair. No conflicting identifiers. Strong match.

Birth year ~1863 for Robert McKee (head_of_household, p_107486297200). Tree person LT1G-QP2 born 1862 — difference of 1 year, within normal census reporting variation. Identity established by name, birth place, 1911 residence, and 5-star FS tree match.

Birth place 'Co Armagh' for Robert McKee (head_of_household). Tree person LT1G-QP2 born in 'Armagh, Armagh, Ireland' — consistent (Co Armagh = County Armagh). Identity established by name, birth year proximity, 1911 residence, and FS tree match.

Record persona p_107486297300 (wife) is named 'Margaret McKee'. Tree person LJK3-9QP is 'Margaret Pollock' (maiden) = 'Margaret McKee' (married to LT1G-QP2 per tree rel-2). Born 1865 Co Down (record) vs 1864 County Down (tree, ±1yr). Couple with LT1G-QP2 confirmed in both record and tree. matchRelatives preScore 0.70. Strong match — surname discrepancy explained by maiden/married name distinction.

Birth year ~1865 for Margaret McKee (wife). Tree person LJK3-9QP born 1864 — difference of 1 year within normal variation. Identity established by name (married name), birth place, 1911 Newry residence, and couple link to LT1G-QP2.

Birth place 'Co Down' for Margaret McKee (wife). Tree person LJK3-9QP born 'County Down, Ireland' — exact match at county level. Identity established by name, birth year proximity, and couple link to LT1G-QP2.

Record persona p_107515831000 (child_1) is named 'Marion McKee', Female, born ~1892 Co Down. Tree person I1 is a stub created for this same 1911 census household with name 'Marion McKee' (Female). The match is exact on name and gender; the stub was created from this record and has no independent corroboration yet. Confident link is not warranted for a single-source stub; probable is the calibrated level.
Birth year ~1892 for Marion McKee (child_1). Attached to stub I1 (Marion McKee) created from this same record. No conflicting birth year. Single-source stub — probable confidence.

Record persona p_107515831100 (child_2) is named 'Jas Fulton McKee', Male, born ~1895 Co Down. Tree person I2 is a stub created for this household with name 'Jas Fulton McKee' (Male). Unusual given name 'Jas Fulton' is highly distinctive and an exact match. Single-source stub — probable confidence.
Birth year ~1895 for Jas Fulton McKee (child_2). Attached to stub I2 created from this record. No conflicting birth year. Single-source stub — probable confidence.

Name 'Robert Raymond M'kee' (M'kee = McKee) on Ireland Civil Registration Index entry FB2F-WZ8 matches subject L8K8-W12 exactly. Highly distinctive double-barreled given name. Registration in Banbridge district, County Down, Q1 1904 aligns precisely with the 1911 census birth year ~1904 and known family residence in Newry, County Down. FamilySearch system reported a 4-star tree match to L8K8-W12 on this record.

Birth registration Q1 1904 (January–March 1904) from Ireland Civil Registration Index corroborates 1911 census-derived birth year ~1904 for L8K8-W12. Two independent derivative sources agree on 1904, providing convergent corroboration. FamilySearch 4-star tree match on this record to L8K8-W12.

Birth place Banbridge district, County Down, Ireland from civil registration index entry for L8K8-W12. Banbridge registration district encompasses Newry, County Down — consistent with the family's 1911 census address (Newry, County Down). Two derivative sources converge on County Down as Robert Raymond McKee's birthplace.

Name 'Robert R McKee' on Illinois Cook County death index entry QVRN-ST2P matches subject L8K8-W12. FamilySearch reported 5-star tree match to L8K8-W12. Death date 18 Aug 1958, Chicago confirms known facts about the subject. Parents Robert McKee and Margaret Pollock on the same record confirm Irish family connection.
Death event 18 Aug 1958, Chicago, Cook, Illinois matches known death facts for L8K8-W12 (Robert Raymond McKee). 5-star FamilySearch tree match confirmed.

Birth date 29 Feb 1904 from Cook County death index for L8K8-W12. Consistent with Irish civil registration Q1 (Jan-Mar) 1904 (a_019) and 1911 census derived birth year ~1904 (a_002). Feb 29, 1904 was a valid date (1904 was a leap year).

Birthplace 'New York City, New York' reported on Cook County death index for L8K8-W12 (5-star tree match). This conflicts with Irish civil reg (a_020, Banbridge, County Down) and 1911 census (a_003, County Down). Confident identity link despite birthplace conflict — the conflict is an evidentiary discrepancy, not an identity doubt.
Father named as 'Robert McKee' on the death certificate of L8K8-W12. Matches LT1G-QP2 (Robert McKee, father) exactly. Corroborates parentage established via 1911 census.
Mother named as 'Margaret Pollock' on the death certificate of L8K8-W12. Matches LJK3-9QP (Margaret Pollock, mother) exactly. Corroborates parentage established via 1911 census.
